song.title: All Day
song.author: Marty Sampson
song.presentation: V1 P C V2 P C B C
song.lyrics:
;Intro: ;E:---------------------------------------------| ;B:---------------------------------------------| ;G:-----------1---------------------------------| ;D:-------2-2---2-----1-2-----------------------| ;A:---2-2---------2-2-----------2-1-------------| ;E:-4----------------------2-2------------------| ; ;Guitar riff: ;E:---------------------------------------------------11r1211-----| ;B:-----12-12--11-11-12-12------4X thenm-12-12-11-11--------------| ;G:------------------------9-8------------------------------------| ;D:---------------------------------------------------------------| ;A:---------------------------------------------------------------| ;E:---------------------------------------------------------------|
[V1] . G#m E B F# I don't care what they say about me . G#m E B F# G#m It's alright, it’s al__right . E B F# I don't care they think about me . G#m E B F# G#m It's alright, they'll get it one day
[P] . E B F# G#m ‘Cause I love You, I'll follow You . E B F# You are my, my life . G#m E B F# I will read my bible and pray . G#m E B F# G#m E B F# G#m E B F# I will follow You all day
[V2] I don't care what it costs anymore Cos' You gave it all and I'm following You I don't care what it takes anymore No matter what happens I'm going Your way ---
[C] . B E B F# B All Day, All Day Now . E G#m E All Day
[B] .C#m E C#m Any_one around can see . E C#m Just how good You've been to me . E C#m For all my friends that don't know You . E B E B F# B E G#m E I pray that You would save them too
